name: Clean Workspace
description: Scan downloads and repo status, compile cleanup report, propose deletions

steps.action: Scan ~/Downloads for files older than 30 days. Check all repos in shared/repos.json for uncommitted changes, untracked files, and stale local branches. Write findings to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Workspace Scan Results'.

Read workspace scan results from inbox. Compile a cleanup report with: (1) old downloads that could be deleted, (2) repos with uncommitted work, (3) stale branches. Send to Anthony via Telegram with proposed deletions — do NOT delete anything without explicit approval.
